fixtures.name: minimal_zup_room
fixtures.expected_outcome: Client/server display-free validation succeeds.

fixtures.name: entity_matrix_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Import succeeds and metadata includes all supported FGD classes.

fixtures.name: scripted_interaction_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Scripted authoritative runtime loads scripts/gate.lua and scripts/pickup.lua.

fixtures.name: lit_zup_room
fixtures.expected_outcome: Generated fixture imports synthetic lightmap metadata; VHLT full profile bakes real lighting.

fixtures.name: spotlight_pitch_down_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: VHLT full profile preserves editor-facing downward spotlight pitch after work-map normalization.

fixtures.name: spotlight_pitch_up_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: VHLT full profile preserves editor-facing upward spotlight pitch after work-map normalization.

fixtures.name: spotlight_yaw_walls_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: VHLT full profile preserves spotlight yaw coverage across room walls.

fixtures.name: spotlight_targeted_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: VHLT full profile accepts target-driven spotlight orientation.

fixtures.name: light_environment_pitch_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: VHLT full profile preserves editor-facing light_environment pitch after work-map normalization.

fixtures.name: texture_axes_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Valve 220 texture axes, shifts, and scales are preserved by the VHLT wrapper.

fixtures.name: material_wad_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Relative WAD material workflow resolves safely or falls back deterministically.

fixtures.name: moving_door_button_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: func_button targets server-authoritative func_door DoorA; collision and presentation transforms are snapshot-owned.

fixtures.name: point_volume_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Point trigger/object collider aliases preserve Z-up extents without brush solids.

fixtures.name: illusionary_static_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: func_wall is solid/static and func_illusionary is visible/nonblocking.

fixtures.name: alias_target_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Alias target authoring preflight accepts supported targetname/target routing metadata.

fixtures.name: invalid_script_escape_zup
fixtures.expected_outcome: Validation fails because _stellar_script uses ../escape.lua.

fixtures.name: invalid_incomplete_brush
fixtures.expected_outcome: Source preflight fails for fewer than four brush planes.

fixtures.name: invalid_malformed_brush
fixtures.expected_outcome: Source preflight fails for malformed/unclosed brush syntax.

fixtures.name: invalid_missing_target
fixtures.expected_outcome: Source preflight fails deterministically for unmatched target.

fixtures.name: invalid_missing_wad_texture
fixtures.expected_outcome: Strict source preflight fails for unresolved WAD texture.
